# Dashboard вЂ” Component Planning Specification v1.1 ## Document Metadata | Field | Value | |---|---| | Screen | Dashboard | | Version | 1.1 | | Change | Addition of Savings Goals Card to `left-column` | | Status | Ready for Implementation | --- ## 1. Component Tree ``` root [page] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ topbar [header] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ topbar-brand [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ topbar-logo [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ topbar-logo-text [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ topbar-add-btn [button-primary] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ topbar-settings-btn [container] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ topbar-settings-icon [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ topbar-avatar [avatar] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nav-tabs [container] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-dashboard [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-dashboard-text [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-dashboard-indicator [divider] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-insights [container] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-insights-text [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-add [container] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ nav-tab-add-text [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ dashboard-body [container] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ left-column [container] в†ђ order: 0 в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-summary-card [section] в†ђ order: 0 в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-card-header [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-card-title [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-status-badge [badge-warning] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-amounts-row [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-spent-group [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-spent-label [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-spent-value [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-total-group [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-total-label [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-remaining-value [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-progress-bar [progress-bar-active] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-progress-meta [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ budget-progress-pct [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-days-left [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ budget-stats-row [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ stat-daily-avg [stat] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ stat-transactions [stat] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ stat-largest [stat] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-chart-card [section] в†ђ order: 1 в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-card-header [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-card-title [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ donut-card-subtitle [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-chart-visual [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ donut-placeholder [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-center-label [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ donut-center-value [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ donut-center-count [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ category-legend [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ legend-food [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ legend-transport [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ legend-housing в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-top [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-name [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-pct [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-bar-track [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-bar-fill [container] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-bottom [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-saved [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-emergency-remaining [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-divider-1 [divider] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-row-vacation [container] в†ђ stagger: 80ms в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-top [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-name [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-pct [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-bar-track [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-bar-fill [container] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-bottom [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-saved [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-vacation-remaining [text] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-divider-2 [divider] в”‚ в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-row-laptop [container] в†ђ stagger: 160ms в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-top [container] в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-name [text] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-pct [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-bar-track [container] в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-bar-fill [container] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-bottom [container] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-saved [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ goal-laptop-remaining [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ right-column [container] в†ђ order: 1 в””в”Ђв”Ђ expenses-card [section] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ expenses-card-header [container] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ expenses-card-title [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ expenses-card-count [badge-info] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-bar [container] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-label [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-chip-all [chip] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-chip-food [chip] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-chip-transport [chip] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-chip-housing [chip] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter-chip-entertainment [chip] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ filter-search [search-input] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ expenses-divider [divider] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ expenses-table-header [container] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ th-date [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ th-merchant [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ th-category [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ th-payment [text] в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ th-amount [text] в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ th-actions [text] в””в”Ђв”Ђ expenses-list [container] в†ђ scrollable в””в”Ђв”Ђ expense-row [container] Г— N в””в”Ђв”Ђ ... (row cells + detail popover anchor) ``` --- ## 2. Layout Rules ### 2.1 Page-Level Layout | Node | Rule | |---|---| | `root` | `flex-direction: column`, `gap: 0`, full viewport width | | `topbar` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between`, `padding: 0 32px`, `height: 64px`, `position: sticky`, `top: 0`, `z-index: 1100` | | `nav-tabs` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `padding: 0 32px`, `height: 48px`, `position: sticky`, `top: 64px`, `z-index: 1000` | | `dashboard-body` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: flex-start`, `gap: 24px`, `padding: 32px`, `min-height: calc(100vh - 112px)` | ### 2.2 Two-Column Body Layout | Node | Rule | |---|---| | `left-column` | `flex-direction: column`, `gap: 24px`, `width: 360px`, `flex-shrink: 0`, `overflow-y: auto`, `max-height: calc(100vh - 144px)` | | `right-column` | `flex-direction: column`, `flex: 1 1 auto`, `min-width: 0`, `gap: 0` | > **Left column scroll note:** With three stacked cards the left column will exceed viewport height on displays shorter than ~900px. `overflow-y: auto` on `left-column` enables independent scrolling. A subtle scroll-shadow gradient (`rgba(15,23,42,0)` в†’ `rgba(15,23,42,0.8)`) applied at the bottom edge via a `::after` pseudo-element signals overflow content. ### 2.3 Savings Goals Card вЂ” Internal Layout ``` savings-goals-card display: flex flex-direction: column gap: 20px padding: 24px ``` | Sub-container | Layout Rule | |---|---| | `savings-goals-header` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between` | | `goal-row-[name]` | `flex-direction: column`, `gap: 8px`, `padding: 4px 0`, `border-radius: 8px`, `cursor: pointer` | | `goal-[name]-top` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between` | | `goal-[name]-bar-track` | `width: 100%`, `height: 8px`, `border-radius: 4px`, `overflow: hidden` | | `goal-[name]-bar-fill` | `height: 8px`, `border-radius: 4px`, `transform-origin: left center` | | `goal-[name]-bottom` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between` | | `goal-divider-[n]` | `width: 100%`, `height: 1px`, `flex-shrink: 0` | ### 2.4 Expenses Card вЂ” Internal Layout | Node | Rule | |---|---| | `expenses-card` | `flex-direction: column`, `gap: 0`, `padding: 24px` | | `expenses-card-header` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between`, `padding-bottom: 16px` | | `filter-bar` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `gap: 8px`, `flex-wrap: nowrap`, `overflow-x: auto` | | `expenses-table-header` | `flex-direction: row`, `align-items: center`, `padding: 8px 16px` | | `expenses-list` | `flex-direction: column`, `overflow-y: auto`, `max-height: calc(100vh - 320px)` | --- ## 3. Token Bindings ### 3.1 Global Token Map Reference | Token Name | Resolved Value | Usage | |---|---|---| | `background-primary` | `#0F172A` | Page root background | | `surface-primary` | `#1E293B` | All card backgrounds | | `surface-elevated` | `#293548` | Progress bar tracks, hover states, month selector | | `text-primary` | `#CBD5E1` | Headings, body text, goal names | | `text-secondary` | `#64748B` | Labels, subtitles, amount sub-labels | | `text-on-cta` | `#0F172A` | Text on gold button backgrounds | | `cta-primary` | `#F59E0B` | Manage link, Add Expense button, active indicators | | `cta-hover` | `#D97706` | Button/link hover states | | `border-default` | `#334155` | Dividers, card borders | | `border-focus` | `#F59E0B` | Focus rings (2px, 2px offset) | | `success` | `#14B8A6` | 50вЂ“79% progress fill and label, completion state | | `warning` | `#F59E0B` | 80вЂ“99% progress fill and label, "Almost there!" | | `info` | `#38BDF8` | 0вЂ“49% progress fill | | `error` | `#F87171` | Error/over-budget states | | `shadow-md` | `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` | Card elevation | | `shadow-sm` | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` | Topbar, nav | ### 3.2 Savings Goals Card вЂ” Node-Level Token Bindings #### Container Tokens | Node | Property | Token | Resolved Value | |---|---|---|---| | `savings-goals-card` | `background` | `surface-primary` | `#1E293B` | | `savings-goals-card` | `box-shadow` | `shadow-md` | `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` | | `savings-goals-card` | `border-radius` | `large` | `16px` | | `goal-row-[name]:hover` | `background` | `surface-elevated` | `#293548` | | `goal-[name]-bar-track` | `background` | `surface-elevated` | `#293548` | | `goal-emergency-bar-fill` | `background` | `success` | `#14B8A6` | | `goal-vacation-bar-fill` | `background` | `info` | `#38BDF8` | | `goal-laptop-bar-fill` | `background` | `warning` | `#F59E0B` | | `goal-divider-[n]` | `background` | `border-default` | `#334155` | #### Text Tokens | Node | `color` Token | `typography` Role | Resolved Size/Weight | |---|---|---|---| | `savings-goals-title` | `text-primary` | `heading-2` | 16px / 600 | | `savings-goals-manage-link` | `cta-primary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-emergency-name` | `text-primary` | `body` | 14px / 400 | | `goal-vacation-name` | `text-primary` | `body` | 14px / 400 | | `goal-laptop-name` | `text-primary` | `body` | 14px / 400 | | `goal-emergency-pct` | `success` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-vacation-pct` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-laptop-pct` | `warning` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-emergency-saved` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-vacation-saved` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-laptop-saved` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-emergency-remaining` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-vacation-remaining` | `text-secondary` | `label` | 12px / 500 | | `goal-laptop-remaining` | `warning` | `label` | 12px / 500 вЂ” renders "Almost there!" | > **Accessibility note:** Verify `text-secondary` (`#64748B`) against `surface-primary` (`#1E293B`) at 12px/500. If contrast ratio falls below 4.5:1, elevate to `text-primary` (`#CBD5E1`) for amount sub-labels only. ### 3.3 Status Color Decision Table | Completion % | Bar Fill Token | Percentage Label Token | Bottom-right Text | Bottom-right Token | |---|---|---|---|---| | 0вЂ“49% | `info` (`#38BDF8`) | `text-secondary` | `"$X to go"` | `text-secondary` | | 50вЂ“79% | `success` (`#14B8A6`) | `success` | `"$X to go"` | `text-secondary` | | 80вЂ“99% | `warning` (`#F59E0B`) | `warning` | `"Almost there!"` | `warning` | | 100% | `success` | `success` | `"Goal reached! рџЋ‰"` | `success` | | >100% | `success` (capped at 100% width) | `success` | `"Goal exceeded"` | `success` | ### 3.4 Focus Ring Token Binding | State | Property | Token | Value | |---|---|---|---| | `savings-goals-manage-link:focus-visible` | `outline` | `border-focus` | `2px solid #F59E0B` | | `savings-goals-manage-link:focus-visible` | `outline-offset` | вЂ” | `2px` | | `goal-row-[name]:focus-visible` | `outline` | `border-focus` | `2px solid #F59E0B` | | `goal-row-[name]:focus-visible` | `outline-offset` | вЂ” | `2px` | --- ## 4. Responsive Breakpoints ### 4.1 Breakpoint Definitions | Breakpoint Key | Min Width | Max Width | Layout Mode | |---|---|---|---| | `mobile` | вЂ” | 639px | Out of scope (desktop-only product per PRD) | | `tablet` | 640px | 767px | Out of scope | | `tablet-lg` | 768px | 1023px | Single-column stacked | | `desktop` | 1024px | 1439px | Two-column standard | | `wide` | 1440px | вЂ” | Two-column expanded | ### 4.2 Per-Breakpoint Layout Rules #### `wide` (в‰Ґ 1440px) вЂ” Expanded Two-Column ``` dashboard-body: flex-direction: row gap: 24px padding: 32px left-column: width: 400px flex-shrink: 0 savings-goals-card: width: 100% (inherits 400px) right-column: flex: 1 1 auto ``` #### `desktop` (1024pxвЂ“1439px) вЂ” Standard Two-Column ``` dashboard-body: flex-direction: row gap: 24px padding: 32px left-column: width: 360px flex-shrink: 0 savings-goals-card: width: 100% (inherits 360px) right-column: flex: 1 1 auto ``` #### `tablet-lg` (768pxвЂ“1023px) вЂ” Single Column Stacked ``` dashboard-body: flex-direction: column gap: 24px padding: 24px left-column: width: 100% max-width: 560px align-self: stretch overflow-y: visible /* no independent scroll in stacked mode */ savings-goals-card: width: 100% max-width: 560px goal-[name]-name: max-width: 200px white-space: nowrap overflow: hidden text-overflow: ellipsis right-column: width: 100% ``` > **Stacked mode scroll:** In `tablet-lg`, the entire page scrolls natively. The left column's `overflow-y: auto` is removed (`overflow-y: visible`) to avoid nested scroll traps. The expenses list maintains its own `overflow-y: auto`. ### 4.3 Component-Level Responsive Adjustments | Component | `desktop` | `wide` | `tablet-lg` | |---|---|---|---| | `left-column` width | `360px` | `400px` | `100%`, max `560px` | | `savings-goals-card` padding | `24px` | `24px` | `20px` | | `goal-[name]-name` max-width | unrestricted | unrestricted | `200px` with ellipsis | | `left-column` overflow-y | `auto` | `auto` | `visible` | | Two-column vs. stacked | Two-column | Two-column | Stacked | | `expenses-list` max-height | `calc(100vh - 320px)` | `calc(100vh - 320px)` | `480px` fixed | | `filter-bar` overflow-x | `nowrap` | `nowrap` | `auto` (scrollable chips) | --- ## 5. Animation Specification ### 5.1 Animation Token Bindings | Animation | Duration Token | Easing | Trigger | |---|---|---|---| | Progress bar fill (load) | `slow` (600ms) | `emphasized` | Card enters viewport (`IntersectionObserver`) | | Progress bar fill (month change) | `slow` (600ms) | `emphasized` | `month-prev-btn` / `month-next-btn` click | | Percentage counter text | `normal` (400ms) | `default` | Same as bar fill | | Goal row hover background | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | `mouseenter` / `mouseleave` | | Goal row stagger offset | 80ms per row | вЂ” | Applied as `animation-delay` per row index | | Completion pulse (100%) | `normal` (300ms) | `emphasized` | First render at 100% | | "Manage" hover underline | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | `mouseenter` | ### 5.2 Stagger Schedule | Goal Row | `animation-delay` | |---|---| | `goal-row-emergency` | `0ms` | | `goal-row-vacation` | `80ms` | | `goal-row-laptop` | `160ms` | ### 5.3 Reduced Motion Overrides ```css @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .goal-bar-fill { transition: none; animation: none; /* renders at final width immediately */ } .goal-pct-counter { transition: none; /* renders final value immediately */ } .goal-row:hover { transition: none; background-color: var(--surface-elevated); } .completion-pulse { animation: none; } } ``` --- ## 6. Accessibility Specification ### 6.1 ARIA Roles and Labels ```html
Emergency Fund 75%
$7,500 saved $2,500 to go
...
...
``` ### 6.2 Screen Reader Read Order (per goal row) > *"[Goal Name] savings goal. [X]% complete. $[saved] saved of $[target] target. $[remaining] remaining."* Example: *"Emergency Fund savings goal. 75% complete. $7,500 saved of $10,000 target. $2,500 remaining."* For the 90% laptop goal: *"New Laptop savings goal. 90% complete. $1,800 saved of $2,000 target. Almost there!"* ### 6.3 Keyboard Navigation Order ``` Tab в†’ savings-goals-manage-link (focus ring: 2px gold-amber, 2px offset) Tab в†’ goal-row-emergency (if interactive; future) Tab в†’ goal-row-vacation Tab в†’ goal-row-laptop ``` Progress bar `div` elements carry `role="presentation"` and `aria-hidden="true"` вЂ” data is fully conveyed via adjacent text nodes. ### 6.4 Non-Color Redundancy Checklist | Signal | Primary Encoding | Redundant Encoding | |---|---|---| | Goal progress | Bar fill width (spatial) | Percentage text (numeric) | | Progress status | Fill color | Percentage label color + "Almost there!" text | | Near-complete state (90%) | Amber bar + amber label | "Almost there!" semantic text | | Complete state (100%) | Full green bar | "Goal reached! рџЋ‰" + "Complete вњ“" label | --- ## 7. Edge State Specifications ### 7.1 Empty State (No Goals Configured) ``` savings-goals-card в””в”Ђв”Ђ savings-goals-empty [container] в”њв”Ђв”Ђ savings-goals-empty-icon [icon/container] вЂ” 48px, border-default color в”њв”Ђв”Ђ savings-goals-empty-text [text] вЂ” "No savings goals yet", body, text-secondary в””в”Ђв”Ђ savings-goals-empty-cta [text] вЂ” "+ Add a goal", label, cta-primary ``` Layout: `flex-direction: column`, `align-items: center`, `gap: 12px`, `padding: 24px 0` ### 7.2 Complete Goal (100%) | Node | Override | |---|---| | `goal-[name]-bar-fill` | `width: 100%`, `background: success` | | `goal-[name]-pct` | `content: "Complete вњ“"`, `color: success` | | `goal-[name]-remaining` | `content: "Goal reached! рџЋ‰"`, `color: success` | | Bar pulse animation | `scale(1.0) в†’ scale(1.02) в†’ scale(1.0)`, 300ms, `ease-in-out`, plays once on first render | ### 7.3 Over-Contributed Goal (> 100%) | Node | Override | |---|---| | `goal-[name]-bar-fill` | `width: 100%` (capped), `background: success` | | `goal-[name]-pct` | `content: "100%"`, `color: success` | | `goal-[name]-remaining` | `content: "Goal exceeded"`, `color: success` | ### 7.4 Long Goal Names (> 20 characters) ```css .goal-name { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 180px; /* desktop: 360px card в€’ percentage label в€’ padding */ } ``` Full name exposed via `title="[full goal name]"` attribute for native tooltip. --- ## 8. Node Properties Reference вЂ” Savings Goals Card ### 8.1 Container Nodes | Node ID | Type | Width | Height | Radius | Background | Shadow | Padding | Gap | |---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---| |
